name: Company Data API
description: Company/business information from public sources. Search companies, get details via Wikidata, look up domains, and enrich with technology detection.
long_description: A Company Data Enrichment API built on Cloudflare Workers. Search for companies via Wikidata, get detailed company information (founding date, headquarters, website, industry, CEO, employees), look up company info by domain (website metadata + RDAP registration data), and perform full company enrichment including technology stack detection, social media links, and contact information. Data sourced from Wikidata, RDAP, and web scraping. Perfect for CRM enrichment, lead generation, and competitive intelligence.

endpoints.name: Search Companies
endpoints.description: Search for companies by name via Wikidata

endpoints.name: Get Company Details
endpoints.description: Get detailed company information from Wikidata

endpoints.name: Domain Lookup
endpoints.description: Get company info by domain (website metadata + RDAP)

endpoints.name: Full Enrichment
endpoints.description: Full company enrichment including metadata, tech stack, social links, and contacts

endpoints.name: API Info
endpoints.description: Get API information and available endpoints
